dict.string: Sierra uses Face ID to securely unlock the app and protect fleet data.
Sierra uses your location to navigate routes and track trip progress.
Sierra tracks your location in the background during active trips so the fleet manager can monitor delivery progress in real time.
Sierra tracks your location in the background during active trips so the fleet manager can monitor delivery progress in real time.
Sierra uses the camera to photograph vehicle condition during inspections and capture proof of delivery.
Sierra accesses your photo library to attach vehicle inspection photos and delivery proof.
Sierra saves inspection and delivery photos to your photo library.
